top_signals.title: Brazil Police Target Lula Ally in Banco Master Probe
top_signals.summary: Brazil’s federal police targeted Senator Jaques Wagner, the government leader in the upper house, as part of an investigation into alleged irregularities linked to Banco Master, according to a person with knowledge of the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwanese president calls for deeper cooperation with Japan
top_signals.summary: At a news conference in Taipei with foreign media, Lai said Japan and Taiwan are the most important drivers of a free and open Indo-Pacific.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Godfather of AI blasts Musk's xAI as 'failure,' says labs are risking a 'big bubble explosion'
top_signals.summary: Yann LeCun's comments renew a long-running spat with Musk and cast doubt over valuations of some of the world's biggest AI companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
